content:
# Tasks

This task list implements the approved design for the multi-domain agent framework. Tasks are grouped by tier and phase, following the tiered implementation mapping in `design.md`. Each task is atomic: it names the file(s) to create or modify, the acceptance criteria, and required tests.

Status markers: `[ ]` pending, `[-]` in-progress, `[x]` completed.

---

## Tier 1 — MVP: Working Single-Domain Loop

### Phase 0: Foundation

- [ ] 1. Create top-level directory skeleton: `domains/`, `agents/`, `agents/_orchestrator/`, `agents/_maintenance/`, `workflows/cross_domain/`, `workflows/maintenance/`, `harness/core/`, `harness/providers/`, `harness/tools/`, `harness/authoring/`, `harness/schemas/`, `harness/templates/`, `harness/cli/`, `harness/tests/`, `config/environments/`. Add `.gitkeep` to empty leaf dirs. Test: directory structure lint validates all expected paths.
- [ ] 2. Create `AGENTS.md` repository map. Short map listing directory purposes, key entry points, link to `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`. Keep under 80 lines. Test: lint checks existence and length.
- [ ] 3. Create `docs/` knowledge tree: `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/PLANS.md`, `docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md`, `docs/RELIABILITY.md`, `docs/SECURITY.md`, `docs/design-docs/`, `docs/exec-plans/active/`, `docs/exec-plans/completed/`, `docs/references/`, `docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md`. Test: doc-tree lint validates all required docs exist.
- [ ] 4. Create `config/categories.yaml` with `reasoning`, `fast-codegen`, `security-analysis`, `cost-optimized` categories. MVP all point to Anthropic. Test: YAML schema validation; unit test loads and parses.
- [ ] 5. Create `config/environments/local.yaml` and `config/environments/cloud.yaml`. Local: filesystem storage, interactive permissions. Cloud: placeholder secret manager, fail-closed. Test: unit test loads both and validates required keys.
- [ ] 6. Create `Makefile` with targets: `setup`, `lint`, `test`, `agent-run`, `workflow-run`, `validate`, `certify`. All delegate to `harness/cli/`. Test: `make help` exits 0.
- [ ] 7. Create CLI entry point `harness/cli/ai.py` with stub subcommands: `domain`, `pack`, `agent`, `workflow`, `validate`, `certify`, `publish`, `run`. Test: `./ai --help` exits 0 and lists subcommands.
- [ ] 8. Create replay test harness: `harness/tests/replay/recorder.py` and `harness/tests/replay/player.py`. Recorder serializes provider calls to JSON fixtures; player replays them. Test: unit test records and replays a mock call.
- [ ] 9. Create test fixture directories: `harness/tests/fixtures/provider_recordings/`, `harness/tests/fixtures/manifests/`, `harness/tests/fixtures/workflows/`. Test: fixture dir lint.

### Phase 1: Core Domain Model + Contracts

- [ ] 10. Define `DomainManifest` schema in `harness/schemas/domain_manifest.py`. Fields: name, owner, purpose, workspace_policy, ports, autonomy_profile, default_tool_packs, version. Export JSON Schema. Test: validates good manifest, rejects bad.
- [ ] 11. Define `CapabilityPackManifest` schema in `harness/schemas/capability_pack_manifest.py`. Fields: name, domain, agents, shared_tools, version. Test: validates pack with agent and tool refs.
- [ ] 12. Define `AgentManifest` schema in `harness/schemas/agent_manifest.py`. Fields: id, domain, pack, version, category, capabilities, input_schema_ref, output_schema_ref, permissions, tool_bindings, execution_mode, grading_criteria_ref. Test: validates manifest, rejects missing category.
- [ ] 13. Define `WorkflowDefinition` schema in `harness/schemas/workflow_definition.py`. Fields: name, domain, steps (sequence/DAG), gates, dependencies, reset_points, budget, ports. Test: validates linear and DAG; rejects circular dep.
- [ ] 14. Define `ToolManifest` schema in `harness/schemas/tool_manifest.py`. Fields: id, adapter_class, auth_mode, timeout, retries, rate_limit, sandbox, credential_source, output_normalization, audit_logging. Test: validates each adapter class.
- [ ] 15. Define `ToolPackManifest` schema in `harness/schemas/tool_pack_manifest.py`. Fields: id, tools, default_policy. Test: validates tool pack with refs.
- [ ] 16. Define `TaskEnvelope` contract in `harness/core/contracts/task_envelope.py`. Fields: task_id, workflow_id, agent_id, input_payload, routing_metadata, budget, timeout, execution_mode_override. Test: create, serialize, deserialize.
- [ ] 17. Define `RunRecord` contract in `harness/core/contracts/run_record.py`. Fields: trace_id, task_id, workflow_id, agent_id, version, provider, model, tokens_used, cost, duration, status, failure_reason, tool_usage. Test: create and validate.
- [ ] 18. Define `ArtifactRecord` contract in `harness/core/contracts/artifact_record.py`. Fields: artifact_id, type (enum), path, metadata, created_at. Test: create for each type.
- [ ] 19. Define `Checkpoint` contract in `harness/core/contracts/checkpoint.py`. Fields: checkpoint_id, workflow_id, step, state_snapshot, artifacts, created_at, resumable. Test: create and serialize.
- [ ] 20. Define `FeatureContract` contract in `harness/core/contracts/feature_contract.py`. Fields: contract_id, criteria (PASS/FAIL list), source_agent, target_evaluator. Test: create and grade mock result.
- [ ] 21. Define `PortBinding` contract in `harness/core/contracts/port_binding.py`. Fields: provider_domain, provider_port, consumer_domain, consumer_port, schema_ref, version_range. Test: validate compatible and incompatible bindings.
- [ ] 22. Define `StorageBackend` abstract interface in `harness/core/storage/base.py`. Methods: save_artifact, load_artifact, save_checkpoint, load_checkpoint, save_run_record, query_run_records, list_artifacts. Test: verify contract with mock.
- [ ] 23. Implement `LocalFilesystemStorage` in `harness/core/storage/local_fs.py`. Stores under `.harness/runs/<trace_id>/`. Test: integration save/load to temp dir.
- [ ] 24. Implement `ManifestRegistry` in `harness/core/registry.py`. Discovers and loads all manifests from `domains/`, `agents/`, `workflows/`, `harness/tools/`. Lookup by domain, pack, agent, tool, workflow. Test: fixture manifests discovery and lookup.

### Phase 2: Core Harness Engine

- [ ] 25. Define `BaseRuntime` abstract class in `harness/core/runtime/base.py`. Methods: resolve_workspace, resolve_credentials, resolve_permissions, get_output_mode, get_storage_backend. Test: abstract contract.
- [ ] 26. Implement `LocalRuntime` in `harness/core/runtime/local.py`. Interactive permissions, filesystem workspace, env credentials, console output. Test: integration resolve workspace.
- [ ] 27. Implement `WorktreeManager` in `harness/core/runtime/worktree_manager.py`. Provision isolated worktree per run, cleanup on completion. Test: integration create/write/cleanup.
- [ ] 28. Define `BaseProvider` abstract class in `harness/providers/base_provider.py`. Methods: chat, stream. Define LLMResponse, LLMChunk dataclasses. Test: interface contract.
- [ ] 29. Implement `AnthropicProvider` in `harness/providers/anthropic_provider.py`. Wrap Anthropic SDK with thinking mode, tool use, streaming. Test: replay with recorded fixture.
- [ ] 30. Implement `ProviderRouter` (single-provider MVP) in `harness/providers/router.py`. Category -> config -> provider. MVP always Anthropic. Per-agent override. Test: routes agent to correct config.
- [ ] 31. Implement `AgentRunner` in `harness/core/agent_runner.py`. Takes TaskEnvelope + AgentManifest + runtime. Loads prompt, tools, schemas. Executes turn loop. Produces RunRecord + ArtifactRecords. Test: replay with mock agent.
- [ ] 32. Implement execution mode dispatcher in `harness/core/execution_modes.py`. Dispatches to react_loop, plan_execute_loop, chain_of_thought, self_ask, tree_of_thought. Test: unit for react_loop with mock.
- [ ] 33. Implement `react_loop` in `harness/core/modes/react.py`. Think -> tool call -> observe -> repeat. Test: replay 3-step cycle.
- [ ] 34. Implement `plan_execute_loop` in `harness/core/modes/plan_execute.py`. Phase 1 plan, Phase 2 execute steps. Test: replay plan + 2 steps.
- [ ] 35. Implement `ContextEngine` in `harness/core/context_engine.py`. Build context from prompt, payload, checkpoint, tools, workflow. Compaction and reset. Test: build context, verify token estimation.
- [ ] 36. Implement `Guardrails` in `harness/core/guardrails.py`. Schema validation, command allowlist/blocklist, path bounds, content risk stub. Test: validate good input, reject bad path, reject blocked command.
- [ ] 37. Implement `PermissionResolver` in `harness/core/permissions.py`. Resolve permissions from agent, domain, runtime. Local interactive, cloud fail-closed. Audit trail. Test: allow, deny, escalation.
- [ ] 38. Implement `MessageBus` in `harness/core/message_bus.py`. Typed inter-agent message passing with PortBinding-compatible payloads. Test: send typed message, verify schema enforcement.
- [ ] 39. Implement `HandoffManager` in `harness/core/handoff.py`. Checkpoint at reset points, resume from checkpoint. Test: integration checkpoint and resume.
- [ ] 40. Implement `CompositionEngine` (linear MVP) in `harness/core/composition_engine.py`. Execute WorkflowDefinition steps in sequence. Pass artifacts via ports. Enforce gates. Test: integration 3-step linear workflow.
- [ ] 41. Implement `BrowserBridge` stub in `harness/core/browser_bridge.py`. Interface for UI inspection. MVP: stub logging. Test: call methods without error.
- [ ] 42. Implement `ObservabilityBridge` in `harness/core/observability_bridge.py`. Read logs, metrics, traces from local run records. Test: read from fixture dir.
- [ ] 43. Implement structured logging and metrics in `harness/core/metrics/logger.py` and `harness/core/metrics/collector.py`. JSON logging with trace_id, agent_id. Token/cost/duration per run. Test: emit and verify JSON.
- [ ] 44. Implement `ValidationPipeline` in `harness/core/validation_pipeline.py`. Lint, schema check, permission check, structural validation. Test: validate correct manifest, reject invalid.
- [ ] 45. Create architecture lint rules in `harness/core/architecture_lints/rules.py`. Directory structure, manifest presence, doc freshness, dependency direction. Test: detect missing manifest in fixture.

### Phase 3: First Working Backend Workflow

- [ ] 46. Create `backend` domain manifest in `domains/backend/domain.yaml`. Owner, purpose, workspace_policy, ports, autonomy `assisted`. Test: schema validation.
- [ ] 47. Create `backend/build` pack manifest in `domains/backend/packs/build.yaml`. Agents: CodeGenAgent, ValidateAgent, TestAgent, ReviewAgent. Test: pack validation, refs resolve.
- [ ] 48. Create `CodeGenAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/CodeGenAgent/v1/`. system_prompt.md, tools.yaml, input/output schemas, constraints, permissions, grading_criteria. Category: fast-codegen. Mode: plan_execute + react. Test: replay.
- [ ] 49. Create `ValidateAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/ValidateAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: chain_of_thought + self_ask. Test: replay.
- [ ] 50. Create `TestAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/TestAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: react. Tools: test runner CLI ref. Test: replay.
- [ ] 51. Create `ReviewAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/ReviewAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: chain_of_thought + self_ask. Test: replay.
- [ ] 52. Create `backend/quick_change` workflow in `domains/backend/workflows/quick_change.yaml`. Steps: CodeGen -> Validate -> Test -> Review. Gates: validation, test, review pass. Test: topology validation; integration E2E replay.
- [ ] 53. Create E2E test in `harness/tests/e2e/test_backend_quick_change.py`. Full workflow with replay. Verify agents execute, artifacts produced, run records persisted, gates checked. Test: passes in CI.
- [ ] 54. Verify `make workflow-run WORKFLOW=backend/quick_change` works with replay mode. Test: Makefile target succeeds.

---

## Tier 2 — Platform: Multi-Provider + Evaluator + Authoring Kit

### Phase 4: Evaluator Loop + Context Engine

- [ ] 55. Create `PlannerAgent` v1 in `agents/_orchestrator/PlannerAgent/v1/`. Produces FeatureContract with PASS/FAIL criteria. Mode: plan_execute. Test: replay produces valid FeatureContract.
- [ ] 56. Create `EvaluatorAgent` v1 in `agents/_orchestrator/EvaluatorAgent/v1/`. Grades output against FeatureContract. Mode: chain_of_thought + self_ask. Test: replay grades mock output.
- [ ] 57. Implement `EvaluatorLoop` in `harness/core/evaluator_loop.py`. Planner -> Generator -> Evaluator cycle. Configurable max_reflection_rounds. Feed critique back on failure. Test: replay 2-round loop (fail then pass).
- [ ] 58. Implement checkpoint-based context reset in `harness/core/context_engine.py` (extend). Serialize to Checkpoint at reset points, fresh context from checkpoint only. Test: integration no context bleed.

### Phase 5: Multi-Provider + Authoring Kit

- [ ] 59. Implement `OpenAIProvider` in `harness/providers/openai_provider.py`. Wrap OpenAI SDK, tool use, streaming. Test: replay with recorded fixture.
- [ ] 60. Implement `BedrockProvider` in `harness/providers/bedrock_provider.py`. Wrap AWS Bedrock SDK. Test: replay with recorded fixture.
- [ ] 61. Extend `ProviderRouter` for multi-provider in `harness/providers/router.py`. Category-based routing, fallback chains, capability-based, per-agent override. Test: route different agents to different providers; fallback on failure.
- [ ] 62. Implement `Scaffolder` in `harness/authoring/scaffolder.py`. Subcommands: domain init, pack create, agent create, workflow create. Generate from templates. Test: integration scaffold new domain, verify files.
- [ ] 63. Create scaffold templates in `harness/templates/domain/`, `harness/templates/pack/`, `harness/templates/agent/`, `harness/templates/workflow/`. Manifest, schemas, prompt, tools examples. Test: template lint validates manifests.
- [ ] 64. Implement `Validator` in `harness/authoring/validator.py`. Validate manifests, schemas, ports, topology, tools, permissions. Test: validate good domain, reject broken port ref.
- [ ] 65. Implement `Certifier` in `harness/authoring/certifier.py`. Local dry-run, cloud dry-run (simulated), evaluator threshold, observability compliance. Test: integration certify backend with replay.
- [ ] 66. Implement `CompatibilityRegistry` in `harness/authoring/compatibility.py`. Track schema versions and port compatibility. Test: detect breaking schema change.
- [ ] 67. Implement `Publisher` in `harness/authoring/publisher.py`. Publish certified domain to repo-local catalog. Record version, ownership, evidence. Test: integration publish and discover.
- [ ] 68. Wire CLI to authoring kit in `harness/cli/ai.py`. Connect domain init, validate, certify, publish. Test: integration `./ai domain init test_domain`.

### Phase 6: Backend Expansion

- [ ] 69. Add `DesignAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/DesignAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: plan_execute. Test: replay.
- [ ] 70. Add `ArchitectureAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/ArchitectureAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: plan_execute + tree_of_thought. Test: replay.
- [ ] 71. Add `MigrationAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/MigrationAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: plan_execute + react. Test: replay.
- [ ] 72. Add `APIDocAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/APIDocAgent/v1/`. Category: cost-optimized. Mode: plan_execute. Test: replay.
- [ ] 73. Add `DeployConfigAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/DeployConfigAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: react. Test: replay.
- [ ] 74. Add `IntegrationTestAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/IntegrationTestAgent/v1/`. Category: reasoning. Mode: react. Test: replay.
- [ ] 75. Add `SecurityScanAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/SecurityScanAgent/v1/`. Category: security-analysis. Mode: self_ask + react. Test: replay.
- [ ] 76. Add `StyleAgent` v1 in `agents/backend/StyleAgent/v1/`. Category: cost-optimized. Mode: chain_of_thought. Test: replay.
- [ ] 77. Create `backend/feature` workflow in `domains/backend/workflows/feature.yaml`. Full 8-agent workflow. Test: topology validation; replay E2E.
- [ ] 78. Create `backend/bug_fix` workflow in `domains/backend/workflows/bug_fix.yaml`. CodeGen -> Test -> Review. Test: topology validation.
- [ ] 79. Create `backend/refactor` workflow in `domains/backend/workflows/refactor.yaml`. Architecture -> CodeGen -> Test -> Review. Test: topology validation.
- [ ] 80. Publish backend domain via `./ai certify domain backend` and `./ai publish domain backend`. Test: certification passes; discoverable.

---

## Tier 3 — Scale: Multi-Domain + Cloud + Composition

### Phase 7: Composition Engine + Cloud Runtime

- [ ] 81. Extend `CompositionEngine` for DAG execution in `harness/core/composition_engine.py`. Topological sort, parallel branches, join points. Test: integration diamond DAG.
- [ ] 82. Implement `CloudRuntime` in `harness/core/runtime/cloud.py`. Non-interactive, fail-closed, secret-manager creds, JSON output, webhooks. Test: integration with mock secret manager.
- [ ] 83. Implement workflow-defined reset points in `harness/core/composition_engine.py`. Checkpoint, compact context, fresh start. Test: integration verify reset.
- [ ] 84. Create maintenance workflow definitions in `workflows/maintenance/doc_gardening.yaml`, `workflows/maintenance/quality_scoring.yaml`, `workflows/maintenance/drift_cleanup.yaml`. Test: topology validation.
- [ ] 85. Create maintenance agents in `agents/_maintenance/DocGardenerAgent/v1/`, `agents/_maintenance/QualityScoreAgent/v1/`, `agents/_maintenance/DriftCleanupAgent/v1/`. Test: replay for each.

### Phase 8: P1 Domain Packs (QA + Security)

- [ ] 86. Create `qa` domain manifest in `domains/qa/domain.yaml`. Test: manifest validation.
- [ ] 87. Create QA agents (6): TestStrategyAgent, TestPlanAgent, TestAutomationAgent, RegressionAgent, TriageAgent, E2EAgent in `agents/qa/`. Test: replay for each.
- [ ] 88. Create QA workflows in `domains/qa/workflows/regression_cycle.yaml` and `domains/qa/workflows/feature_verification.yaml`. Test: topology; replay E2E.
- [ ] 89. Certify and publish QA domain. Test: certification passes.
- [ ] 90. Create `security` domain manifest in `domains/security/domain.yaml`. Test: manifest validation.
- [ ] 91. Create Security agents (6): SASTAgent, SCAAgent, DASTAgent, SecretsAgent, ComplianceAgent, IaCScanAgent in `agents/security/`. Test: replay for each.
- [ ] 92. Create Security workflows in `domains/security/workflows/application_audit.yaml` and `domains/security/workflows/compliance_check.yaml`. Test: topology.
- [ ] 93. Certify and publish Security domain. Test: certification passes.

### Phase 9: P2 Domain Packs (Frontend + DevOps)

- [ ] 94. Create `frontend` domain with 6 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 95. Certify and publish Frontend domain. Test: certification passes.
- [ ] 96. Create `devops` domain with 4 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 97. Certify and publish DevOps domain. Test: certification passes.

### Phase 10: P3 Domain Packs (PM + Incident + Docs)

- [ ] 98. Create `pm` domain with 5 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 99. Certify and publish PM domain. Test: certification passes.
- [ ] 100. Create `incident` domain with 6 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 101. Certify and publish Incident domain. Test: certification passes.
- [ ] 102. Create `docs` domain with 4 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 103. Certify and publish Docs domain. Test: certification passes.

### Phase 11: Cross-Domain Workflows + Integration

- [ ] 104. Create `workflows/cross_domain/feature_delivery.yaml`. Composes: pm -> backend -> qa -> security -> release. Test: topology; replay E2E with mocks.
- [ ] 105. Create `workflows/cross_domain/production_incident.yaml`. Composes: incident -> backend -> qa. Test: topology.
- [ ] 106. Create `workflows/cross_domain/compliance_review.yaml`. Test: topology.
- [ ] 107. Create `workflows/cross_domain/sprint_retrospective.yaml`. Test: topology.
- [ ] 108. Create CI/CD hook interface in `harness/core/ci_hooks.py`. Trigger workflows from CI events. Test: unit simulates CI trigger.
- [ ] 109. Create canary/rollback hook interface in `harness/core/deployment_hooks.py`. Test: unit test.
- [ ] 110. Implement provider fallback chains in `harness/providers/router.py`. On failure try next in chain. Test: unit fallback primary to secondary.

### Phase 12: Future P4 Domains

- [ ] 111. Create `data` domain with 5 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 112. Create `release` domain with 4 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 113. Create `compliance` domain with 4 agents and workflows. Test: manifest, replay, topology.
- [ ] 114. Certify and publish all P4 domains. Test: certification passes.

---

## Cross-Cutting Tasks

### Tool Adapters

- [ ] 115. Implement `CLIToolAdapter` in `harness/tools/adapters/cli_adapter.py`. Shell commands with timeout, sandbox, output capture. Normalize to ArtifactRecord. Test: integration `echo hello`.
- [ ] 116. Implement `MCPToolAdapter` in `harness/tools/adapters/mcp_adapter.py`. Connect to MCP server, invoke, capture. Test: integration with mock MCP.
- [ ] 117. Implement `HTTPAPIToolAdapter` in `harness/tools/adapters/http_api_adapter.py`. HTTP with auth, rate limit, retry, timeout. Test: integration with mock HTTP server.
- [ ] 118. Implement `ToolResolver` in `harness/tools/resolver.py`. Resolve tool:// and toolpack:// refs. Validate availability, creds, permissions. Test: resolve refs, detect missing cred.
- [ ] 119. Create platform tool packs: `harness/tools/packs/build_core.yaml`, `harness/tools/packs/github_pr.yaml`, `harness/tools/packs/browser_validation.yaml`, `harness/tools/packs/observability_read.yaml`. Test: pack validation.

### Documentation

- [ ] 120. Write `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` with full system architecture description.
- [ ] 121. Write authoring guide in `docs/references/authoring-guide.md`.
- [ ] 122. Write tool integration guide in `docs/references/tool-integration-guide.md`.
- [ ] 123. Write domain certification guide in `docs/references/certification-guide.md`.
- [ ] 124. Update `AGENTS.md` after each phase completion.

### Quality and Enforcement

- [ ] 125. Create manifest schema JSON exports for all manifest types.
- [ ] 126. Add doc-freshness lint to CI.
- [ ] 127. Add dependency-direction lint to CI.
- [ ] 128. Add topology lint for workflow definitions.
- [ ] 129. Add schema-naming lint for contracts.
- [ ] 130. Create quality scorecard template per domain.
